de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.label

Class TermLabelManager.RefactoringsContainer

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.label.TermLabelManager.RefactoringsContainer
  • Enclosing class:
    TermLabelManager

    protected static class TermLabelManager.RefactoringsContainer
extends Object
    Utility class used by TermLabelManager#computeRefactorings(TermServices, PosInOccurrence, Term, Rule, Goal, Term).
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private ImmutableList<TermLabelRefactoring> belowUpdatesRefactorings
      The TermLabelRefactoring for TermLabelRefactoring.RefactoringScope.APPLICATION_BELOW_UPDATES.

      The TermLabelRefactoring for TermLabelRefactoring.RefactoringScope.APPLICATION_CHILDREN_AND_GRANDCHILDREN_SUBTREE.

      The TermLabelRefactoring for TermLabelRefactoring.RefactoringScope.APPLICATION_DIRECT_CHILDREN.

      The TermLabelRefactoring for TermLabelRefactoring.RefactoringScope.SEQUENT.

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      ImmutableList<TermLabelRefactoring> getAllApplicationChildAndGrandchildRefactorings()
      Returns all TermLabelRefactorings which operate on application child and grand children, which are getChildAndGrandchildRefactorings() and getChildAndGrandchildRefactoringsAndParents().

      Returns the TermLabelRefactoring for TermLabelRefactoring.RefactoringScope.APPLICATION_BELOW_UPDATES.

      Returns the TermLabelRefactoring for TermLabelRefactoring.RefactoringScope.APPLICATION_DIRECT_CHILDREN.
      ImmutableList<TermLabelRefactoring> getSequentRefactorings()
      Returns the TermLabelRefactoring for TermLabelRefactoring.RefactoringScope.SEQUENT.

      • TermLabelManager.RefactoringsContainer

        public TermLabelManager.RefactoringsContainer(ImmutableList<TermLabelRefactoring> sequentRefactorings,
                                      ImmutableList<TermLabelRefactoring> belowUpdatesRefactorings,

                                      ImmutableList<TermLabelRefactoring> childAndGrandchildRefactoringsAndParents,
                                      ImmutableList<TermLabelRefactoring> directChildRefactorings)
        Constructor.
        Parameters:
        sequentRefactorings - The TermLabelRefactoring for TermLabelRefactoring.RefactoringScope.SEQUENT.
        belowUpdatesRefactorings - The TermLabelRefactoring for TermLabelRefactoring.RefactoringScope.APPLICATION_BELOW_UPDATES.
        childAndGrandchildRefactorings - The TermLabelRefactoring for TermLabelRefactoring.RefactoringScope.APPLICATION_CHILDREN_AND_GRANDCHILDREN_SUBTREE.
        childAndGrandchildRefactoringsAndParents - The TermLabelRefactoring for TermLabelRefactoring.RefactoringScope.APPLICATION_CHILDREN_AND_GRANDCHILDREN_SUBTREE_AND_PARENTS.
        directChildRefactorings - The TermLabelRefactoring for TermLabelRefactoring.RefactoringScope.APPLICATION_DIRECT_CHILDREN.

      • getAllApplicationChildAndGrandchildRefactorings

        public ImmutableList<TermLabelRefactoring> getAllApplicationChildAndGrandchildRefactorings()
        Returns all TermLabelRefactorings which operate on application child and grand children, which are getChildAndGrandchildRefactorings() and getChildAndGrandchildRefactoringsAndParents().
        Returns:
        The combined ImmutableList.
